case_title: HUANG ROY VS THE CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: INVALID SERVICE AS TO THE CITY TOW, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $414.55 FILED BY HUANG ROY AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG ROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $183.13 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $198.13, DEDENDANT WAIVES DEFECTS IN SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
